data.title: XRP price hits $3.45 after breakout, technical signals show rally may extend

data.title: Bank Labs will host the “LBank Labs Nightlife: Hanoi Station” themed afterparty at Ignite Sky Bar in Hanoi on August 1
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News During the GM Vietnam Blockchain Week, LBank Labs will hold a theme afterparty - "LBank Labs Nightlife: Hanoi Station" at the Ignite Sky Bar, the core landmark of Hanoi, from 7pm to 11pm on August 1 (Friday), presenting an immersive party experience that combines the spirit of Web3 with the night scene of the city.
The event is hosted by LBank Labs and will invite about 150-200 guests from the crypto field, including 50 special VIP guests from top projects, VCs, media and communities. LBank Labs Nightlife aims to build a relaxed and efficient offline communication space, providing GM Vietnam participants with an excellent opportunity for industry exchanges and collision of inspiration.

data.title: Dogecoin vs XRP: One Might Pop, the Other Could Actually Stick
data.description:
In the ever-evolving world of cryptocurrency, two notable contenders stand out: Dogecoin and XRP. While one of these digital assets has the potential for a sudden surge in popularity and value, the other may prove to have the staying power and practical utility necessary to thrive in the long run. As investors and enthusiasts alike weigh the merits of each token, one might consider the speculative nature of Dogecoin, which has often been driven by social media trends and community sentiment. On the other hand, XRP, with its focus on facilitating cross-border payments and partnerships with financial institutions, could establish itself as a more enduring player in the cryptocurrency landscape. Ultimately, the future trajectory of these two currencies presents an interesting dichotomy—one might experience explosive growth, while the other could solidify its role as a reliable asset in the digital economy.
source: https://blocknews.com/dogecoin-vs-xrp-one-might-pop-the-other-could-actually-stick/

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Transfers 1000 ETH to Internal Address
data.description: According to BlockBeats, PeckShield monitoring has revealed that the Ethereum Foundation's development team has internally transferred 1000 ETH, valued at approximately $3.6 million, to the EF2 address. This address currently holds 8000 Ethereum, with an estimated value of $29 million.

data.title: Binance Wallet Exclusive TGE to List Delphinus Lab (ZKWASM)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Wallet's exclusive TGE will launch Delphinus Lab (ZKWASM). The subscription time is from 4 pm to 6 pm (UTC+8) on July 22, 2025. Eligible users must use Binance Alpha Points to participate, and an additional 40,000,000 ZKWASM will be used for future activities. Specific details will be announced separately.

data.title: AguilaTrades Reduces Bitcoin Holdings Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, HyperInsight has reported that AguilaTrades, a prominent whale contract trader, has reduced its Bitcoin holdings following a recent market pullback. The trader decreased its long position by 189.26 BTC, resulting in a reduction of $25,957,661 in the total position value.

The specifics of the position include a 20x leveraged long position in Bitcoin, with a total position size of $505,690,940. The entry price for the position was $118,472, and the current unrealized profit stands at $655,580. However, the funding fee associated with the position is negative, amounting to -$1,013,966.

data.title: Prominent Trader Increases Short Position on Ethereum
data.description: According to Foresight News, a notable trader with an 81% success rate in Ethereum (ETH) and Bitcoin (BTC) trading has been identified as the owner of an address that shorted ETH on July 12. This trader recently transferred 5 million USDC to the shorting address as additional margin. The trader initiated the short position when ETH was priced at $2,969 and liquidated their spot ETH holdings on July 14, when the price reached $3,051, opting for a naked short position instead.

data.title: Lista DAO Reports Strong Growth and Future Plans for 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Lista DAO has released its mid-year summary, highlighting significant achievements and future plans. The total value locked (TVL) has surpassed $2.5 billion, and the Lista Lending platform has been launched. Additionally, Lista DAO has partnered with WLFI to become the largest on-chain hub for USD1.

Looking ahead, Lista DAO aims to maintain its leadership in the USD1 Hub. The roadmap for the second half of the year includes enabling PancakeSwap LP positions as collateral for minting lisUSD to enhance capital efficiency, with this feature expected to launch in Q3. Furthermore, a yield-bearing stablecoin based on USD1, backed by U.S. Treasury and corporate bonds, is anticipated to be introduced in early Q3.

The expansion of Lista CDP is also planned to offer fixed-rate and fixed-term loan products. In Q4, Lista DAO intends to launch a decentralized exchange (DEX) integrating lending and automated market maker (AMM) functionalities, allowing the conversion of Lista lending collateral into LP positions.

data.title: Corporate Altcoin Reserves Strategy Gains Attention
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Animoca Brands Research has released a report titled 'Altcoin Strategic Reserves,' highlighting how companies are using financial instruments like convertible bonds and equity issuance to gain exposure to cryptocurrencies. This approach, initially popularized by firms like MicroStrategy, which holds over 600,000 Bitcoins, aims to gradually increase the per-share cryptocurrency holdings as a hedge against inflation and currency devaluation.

Altcoins are now capturing corporate interest. Companies adding assets such as BNB, TRX, HYPE, and FET to their balance sheets are providing scarce investment opportunities for those interested in these tokens but lacking convenient channels like spot ETFs.

The stock market has reacted strongly to such announcements. Animoca's data indicates that companies declaring altcoin holdings see an average single-day stock price increase of 150%, a 185% rise within a week, and a 226% surge over a month. However, these strategies carry significant risks: compared to Bitcoin, altcoins typically exhibit higher volatility, lower liquidity, and more experimental technology, potentially amplifying losses during market downturns.

The report suggests that if these tokens are used for staking or other network-based functions, they could enhance the liquidity, security, and legitimacy of the entire ecosystem, making altcoin reserves a potential catalyst for broader cryptocurrency adoption.

data.title: Giants Protocol announced that it will conduct TGE of G tokens at 21:00 today, with a total supply of 88 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Giants Protocol announced that it will conduct G token TGE through Binance Alpha and Raydium at 21:00 on July 18, with a total supply of 88 billion tokens. It is reported that G tokens support staking, community governance, DeFi and RWA integration functions. In addition, part of the laundry income will be used for monthly token repurchase and destruction plans. Giants Strategy also plans to use G tokens as crypto reserves and conduct IP0 in 2025/2026.
In addition, Giants Protocol issued a statement that it will launch a creator reward event from July 16 to 25. Users can post original posts (more than 4) on X to introduce what Giants Protocol is, what problems it solves, and what its advantages are. Add personal insights or comparisons to keep the content real and easy to understand. In addition, users are required to follow and attach the #GiantsProtocolForG tag to their posts. Each qualified work will receive a G token airdrop, and the best work will receive additional rewards.
Previously, Binance Alpha launched Giants Protocol (G) on July 11, and users with at least 150 Binance Alpha points can claim 88,000 G token airdrops.

data.title: BNB Breaks $720, But Still Trails the Altcoin Pack
data.description:
Despite BNB breaking through the significant price point of $720, it continues to lag behind other altcoins in terms of overall market performance and growth, highlighting a competitive landscape in the cryptocurrency market where other digital assets are gaining momentum and capturing investor interest.
source: https://blocknews.com/bnb-breaks-720-but-still-trails-the-altcoin-pack/

data.title: Binance Introduces Chainbase (C) With Retroactive Airdrop Rewards for BNB Holders
data.description: Binance has announced the upcoming listing of Chainbase (C) — a Hyperdata Network for AI — as the latest project on its HODLer Airdrops page. Eligible users who held BNB in Simple Earn or On-Chain Yields between July 6 and July 9, 2025 (UTC) will receive retroactive airdrops of C tokens directly to their Spot Wallets.This marks the 28th HODLer Airdrop hosted on Binance, highlighting the platform’s commitment to rewarding loyal BNB users through early access to emerging Web3 projects.Chainbase (C) Spot Trading Goes Live on July 18Binance will list Chainbase (C) at 14:00 UTC on July 18, 2025, and open spot trading for the following pairs:C/USDTC/BNBC/USDCC/FDUSDC/TRYDeposits for C tokens are now open, and users can start transferring tokens into their Binance accounts. A Seed Tag will be applied to C at launch, indicating its early-stage nature and higher risk/reward profile.Note: C (LINK) is currently tradable on the Binance Alpha Market. However, Alpha trading will end once spot trading opens, and the volume will no longer count toward Alpha Points.Chainbase Tokenomics and Airdrop DetailsToken Name: Chainbase (C)Genesis & Max Supply: 1,000,000,000 CHODLer Airdrop Allocation: 20,000,000 C (2% of total supply)Additional Airdrop: 10,000,000 C (to be distributed after 3 months; details forthcoming)Circulating Supply at Listing: 160,000,000 C (16%)Listing Fee: 0Smart Contract Addresses:BASE Chain: 0xba12bc7b210e61e5d3110b997a63ea216e0e18f7BNB Chain: 0xc32cc70741c3A8433dCbcB5adE071c299B55FfC8A detailed Chainbase research report will be released within 48 hours of this announcement.How to Qualify for C AirdropsEligible users must have subscribed BNB to Flexible or Locked Simple Earn, or On-Chain Yields between:Start: July 6, 2025, 00:00 UTCEnd: July 9, 2025, 23:59 UTCA user’s airdrop share is determined based on their average BNB holding relative to the total pool, with a hard cap of 4% per user.What Is Chainbase?Chainbase is a Hyperdata Network tailored for AI applications. It enables decentralized data infrastructure that powers real-time AI model interaction and analytics across blockchains. The project is part of a growing wave of infrastructure-layer protocols aiming to bridge blockchain and artificial intelligence.

data.title: Gate Plaza has launched a new function to share trading cards. You can earn up to 10% commission by posting your transactions with one click.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate Square launched the "Share Trading Card" function on July 18, and added two new cards, "Spot Income" and "Trading Robot", for sharing. As an interactive function widely welcomed by the community, this update aims to allow community users to more conveniently display trading results, share investment strategies, and have the opportunity to earn generous commissions through content sharing, up to 10%.
Update the Gate App immediately, enter the Gate Square or hot chat group, and you can get more new experiences including one-click order sharing, multiple cards, and earning while chatting.
